getgenv.label: getgenv
getgenv.description: Returns the global environment for the executor.

getgenv_value.label: getgenv_value
getgenv_value.description: Gets a specific value from the global environment.

isdbgpresent.label: isdbgpresent
isdbgpresent.description: Checks if a debugger is currently attached to the process.

isdebuggerpresent.label: isdebuggerpresent
isdebuggerpresent.description: Alias for isdbgpresent(). Checks for debugger presence.

getobjects.label: getobjects
getobjects.description: Loads and returns objects from a Roblox asset ID or URL.

getinstances.label: getinstances
getinstances.description: Returns all instances in the game, optionally filtered by class name.

getnilinstances.label: getnilinstances
getnilinstances.description: Returns instances that have been parented to nil (hidden instances).

get_instances.label: get_instances
get_instances.description: Alias for getinstances(). Gets all instances.

get_nil_instances.label: get_nil_instances
get_nil_instances.description: Alias for getnilinstances(). Gets nil-parented instances.

GetInstances.label: GetInstances
GetInstances.description: Alias for getinstances(). Gets all instances.

GetNilInstances.label: GetNilInstances
GetNilInstances.description: Alias for getnilinstances(). Gets nil instances.

getloadedmodules.label: getloadedmodules
getloadedmodules.description: Returns all currently loaded ModuleScript instances.

gethiddenproperty.label: gethiddenproperty
gethiddenproperty.description: Gets the value of a hidden or protected property on an instance.

sethiddenproperty.label: sethiddenproperty
sethiddenproperty.description: Sets the value of a hidden or protected property on an instance.

gethiddenproperties.label: gethiddenproperties
gethiddenproperties.description: Returns a list of all hidden properties available on an instance.

getproperties.label: getproperties
getproperties.description: Returns a list of all properties (including hidden) on an instance.

isscriptable.label: isscriptable
isscriptable.description: Checks if a property on an instance can be accessed via scripts.

setscriptable.label: setscriptable
setscriptable.description: Sets whether a property can be accessed via scripts.

getidentity.label: getidentity
getidentity.description: Gets the current thread's identity level (security context).

getthreadidentity.label: getthreadidentity
getthreadidentity.description: Alias for getidentity(). Gets thread identity level.

getthreadcontext.label: getthreadcontext
getthreadcontext.description: Alias for getidentity(). Gets thread context level.

getcontext.label: getcontext
getcontext.description: Alias for getidentity(). Gets current context level.

setidentity.label: setidentity
setidentity.description: Sets the thread identity/context level. Higher levels grant more permissions.

setthreadidentity.label: setthreadidentity
setthreadidentity.description: Alias for setidentity(). Sets thread identity/context level.

setthreadcontext.label: setthreadcontext
setthreadcontext.description: Alias for setidentity(). Sets thread context level.

setcontext.label: setcontext
setcontext.description: Alias for setidentity(). Sets thread context level.

setthreadcapabilities.label: setthreadcapabilities
setthreadcapabilities.description: Sets thread capabilities for the current thread.

set_thread_capabilities.label: set_thread_capabilities
set_thread_capabilities.description: Alias for setthreadcapabilities(). Sets thread capabilities.

getscripts.label: getscripts
getscripts.description: Returns a table of all script instances in the game.

getscriptclosure.label: getscriptclosure
getscriptclosure.description: Gets the closure/function of a script instance.

getrunningscripts.label: getrunningscripts
getrunningscripts.description: Returns scripts that are currently running with threads.

getscriptswiththreads.label: getscriptswiththreads
getscriptswiththreads.description: Alias for getrunningscripts(). Returns scripts with active threads.

getscriptfromthread.label: getscriptfromthread
getscriptfromthread.description: Gets the script instance associated with a thread.

getcallingscript.label: getcallingscript
getcallingscript.description: Returns the script that called the current function.

get_calling_script.label: get_calling_script
get_calling_script.description: Alias for getcallingscript(). Returns the calling script.

getcurrentscript.label: getcurrentscript
getcurrentscript.description: Alias for getcallingscript(). Returns current script.

getscriptbytecode.label: getscriptbytecode
getscriptbytecode.description: Returns the bytecode of a script as a string.

dumpstring.label: dumpstring
dumpstring.description: Alias for getscriptbytecode(). Dumps script bytecode.

getsenv.label: getsenv
getsenv.description: Gets the script environment of a script instance.

getmenv.label: getmenv
getmenv.description: Alias for getsenv(). Gets script environment.

getcallbackvalue.label: getcallbackvalue
getcallbackvalue.description: Gets the callback value from a script or function.

loadstring.label: loadstring
loadstring.description: Compiles a string into a Lua function.

dostring.label: dostring
dostring.description: Compiles and executes a Lua string immediately.

lz4compress.label: lz4compress
lz4compress.description: Compresses data using LZ4 compression algorithm.

getconnections.label: getconnections
getconnections.description: Returns all connections for a signal/event.

firesignal.label: firesignal
firesignal.description: Fires a signal with specified arguments.

hooksignal.label: hooksignal
hooksignal.description: Hooks into a signal to intercept or modify its behavior.

replicatesignal.label: replicatesignal
replicatesignal.description: Replicates a signal across the network.

cansignalreplicate.label: cansignalreplicate
cansignalreplicate.description: Checks if a signal can be replicated across network.

defersignal.label: defersignal
defersignal.description: Defers signal execution to the next frame.

getscripthash.label: getscripthash
getscripthash.description: Returns a hash of the script's bytecode.

getfunctionhash.label: getfunctionhash
getfunctionhash.description: Returns a hash of a function's bytecode.

firetouchinterest.label: firetouchinterest
firetouchinterest.description: Simulates a touch event between two parts.

firetouch.label: firetouch
firetouch.description: Alias for firetouchinterest(). Simulates touch event.

fireclickdetector.label: fireclickdetector
fireclickdetector.description: Fires a ClickDetector as if it was clicked.

fireproximityprompt.label: fireproximityprompt
fireproximityprompt.description: Triggers a ProximityPrompt as if it was activated.

setfps.label: setfps
setfps.description: Sets the FPS cap for the game.

set_fps.label: set_fps
set_fps.description: Alias for setfps(). Sets FPS cap.

setfpscap.label: setfpscap
setfpscap.description: Alias for setfps(). Sets FPS cap.

set_fps_cap.label: set_fps_cap
set_fps_cap.description: Alias for setfps(). Sets FPS cap.

getfps.label: getfps
getfps.description: Returns the current FPS or FPS cap.

get_fps.label: get_fps
get_fps.description: Alias for getfps(). Returns current FPS.

getfpscap.label: getfpscap
getfpscap.description: Alias for getfps(). Returns FPS cap.

get_fps_cap.label: get_fps_cap
get_fps_cap.description: Alias for getfps(). Returns FPS cap.

queue_on_teleport.label: queue_on_teleport
queue_on_teleport.description: Queues code to execute when player teleports to new server.

queueonteleport.label: queueonteleport
queueonteleport.description: Alias for queue_on_teleport(). Queues teleport code.

queueontp.label: queueontp
queueontp.description: Alias for queue_on_teleport(). Queues teleport code.

queue_on_tp.label: queue_on_tp
queue_on_tp.description: Alias for queue_on_teleport(). Queues teleport code.

clearteleportqueue.label: clearteleportqueue
clearteleportqueue.description: Alias for clear_teleport_queue(). Clears teleport queue.

cleartpqueue.label: cleartpqueue
cleartpqueue.description: Alias for clear_teleport_queue(). Clears teleport queue.

clear_tp_queue.label: clear_tp_queue
clear_tp_queue.description: Alias for clear_teleport_queue(). Clears teleport queue.

Start_debUNC.label: MirrorLibrary:Start_debUNC
Start_debUNC.description: Alias for debUNCTest(). Runs alyssagithub's debUNC test.

CheckCustomFunctions.label: MirrorLibrary:CheckCustomFunctions
CheckCustomFunctions.description: Checks existence of all MirrorLibrary functions

Check_Custom_Functions.label: MirrorLibrary:Check_Custom_Functions
Check_Custom_Functions.description: Alias for CheckCustomFunctions(). Checks existence of all MirrorLibrary functions

GetLibVersion.label: MirrorLibrary:GetVersion
GetLibVersion.description: Displays a notification showing the current MirrorLibrary version

RetServerPlrsInfo.label: MirrorLibrary:GetAllPlayerInfo
RetServerPlrsInfo.description: Prints all players' username, display name, and user ID

ListAllOfClass.label: MirrorLibrary:ListAll
ListAllOfClass.description: Lists all of a given class using ipairs

GetPlayerHealth.label: MirrorLibrary:GetPlayerHealth
GetPlayerHealth.description: Returns the specified player's health in a notification

DeleteAllOfClass.label: MirrorLibrary:DestroyAll
DeleteAllOfClass.description: Destroys all instances of the specified class

KillLP.label: MirrorLibrary:KillSelf
KillLP.description: Kills you by setting your health to 0

SetFullBright.label: MirrorLibrary:SetFullBright
SetFullBright.description: Allows you to enable or disable fullbright mode

GetStats.label: MirrorLibrary:GetStats
GetStats.description: Prints current FPS and ping to console

USSI.label: SaveInstance
USSI.description: Custom saveinstance function if the executor doesn't support it
USSI.insert:
local options = {
    __DEBUG_MODE = false, -- Prints debug logs to console about unusual scenarios.
    ReadMe = true, -- Includes a ReadMe file.
    SafeMode = true, -- Kicks you before saving to keep the account safe.
    KillAllScripts = true, -- Kills all scripts to further protect you.
    BoostFPS = false, -- Massively boosts FPS by disabling 3D rendering.
    ShutdownWhenDone = false, -- Shuts the game down after saveinstance is finished.
    AntiIdle = true, -- Prevents the 20-minute idle kick.
    Anonymous = false, -- Cleans the file of info related to your account.
    ShowStatus = true, -- Shows status updates during the process.
    Callback = false, -- Sends serialized data to a function instead of a file.
    mode = "optimized", -- Modes: "full", "optimized", "scripts".
    Decompile = true, -- Enables script decompiling.
    scriptcache = true, -- Uses decompiled script cache.
    DecompileTimeout = 10, -- Decompilation timeout in seconds.
    DecompileJobless = false, -- No new scripts are processed.
    SaveBytecode = false, -- Includes bytecode in output.
    DecompileIgnore = {game:GetService("TextChatService")},
    IgnoreList = {game:GetService("CoreGui"), game:GetService("CorePackages")},
    ExtraInstances = {},
    IgnoreProperties = {},
    SaveCacheInterval = 22400, -- (0x1600 * 10)
    FilePath = false,
    AvoidFileOverwrite = true,
    Object = false,
    IsModel = false,
    NilInstances = false,
    NilInstancesFixes = {
        Animator = function() end, 
        AdPortal = function() end, 
        BaseWrap = function() end, 
        Attachment = function() end
    },
    IgnoreDefaultProperties = true,
    IgnoreNotArchivable = true,
    IgnorePropertiesOfNotScriptsOnScriptsMode = false,
    IgnoreSpecialProperties = false,
    IsolateStarterPlayer = false,
    IsolatePlayers = false,
    IsolateLocalPlayer = false,
    IsolateLocalPlayerCharacter = false,
    SavePlayerCharacters = false,
    SaveNotCreatable = false,
    NotCreatableFixes = {"", "Player", "PlayerScripts", "PlayerGui", "TouchTransmitter"},
    AlternativeWritefile = true,
    IgnoreDefaultPlayerScripts = true,
    IgnoreSharedStrings = true,
    SharedStringOverwrite = false,
    TreatUnionsAsParts = false
}
SaveInstance(options)
